title: Upon Trencherman.
content:
Tom shifts the trenchers; yet he never can
    Endure that lukewarm name of serving-man:
    Serve or not serve, let Tom do what he can,
    He is a serving, who's a trencher-man.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon Trencherman."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
